zh.Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingd: 英國英格蘭素福爾可拉可費爾德
zh.Laxfield, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可拉可費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Fiske於1427年2月26日出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可拉可費爾德時，他的父親Symon Fiske31歲，母親Susanna Smyth26歲。他於大約1454年與Elizabeth Margery Simon在英國英格蘭素福爾可拉可費爾德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1495年10月4日在英國英格蘭素福爾可享年68歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可拉可費爾德。

zh-hans.Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingd: 英国英格兰素福爾可拉可費爾德
zh-hans.Laxfield, Suffolk, England: 英国素福爾可拉可費爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund Fiske于1427年2月26日出生在英国英格兰素福爾可拉可費爾德时，他的父亲Symon Fiske31岁，母亲Susanna Smyth26岁。他于大约1454年与Elizabeth Margery Simon在英国英格兰素福爾可拉可費爾德结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1495年10月4日在英国英格兰素福爾可享年68岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可拉可費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Fiske
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from a farm in western Norway, named from Old Norse fiskr ‘fish’ + -e from vin ‘meadow’.

variants.name: Fisk
meanings: English (East Anglia): metonymic occupational name for a fisherman or fish seller, or a nickname for someone supposedly resembling a fish in some way, from Old Norse fiskr ‘fish’ (cognate with Old English fisc). See Fish 1.

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Fiske was born on 26 February 1427, in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Symon Fiske, was 31 and his mother, Susanna Smyth, was 26. He married Elizabeth Margery Simon about 1454, in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 4 October 1495, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68, and was buried in Laxfield, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Fiske est né le 26 février 1427, à Laxfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Symon Fiske, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Susanna Smyth, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Margery Simon environ 1454, à Laxfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 4 octobre 1495, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Laxfield, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Fiske am 26. Februar 1427 in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Symon Fiske 31 und seine Mutter Susanna Smyth 26. Er hat um 1454 in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Margery Simon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 4. Oktober 1495 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Laxfield, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Fiske è nato il il 26 febbraio 1427 nel Laxfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Symon Fiske, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Susanna Smyth, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Margery Simon circa 1454, nel Laxfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 4 ottobre 1495, nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Laxfield, Suffolk, England.

ja.Suffolk, England, United Kingdom: イギリスイギリススフォルク
ja.Shotley, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクショトリー
ja.Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingd: イギリスイギリススフォルクラクスフィールド
ja.Laxfield, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクラクスフィールド
ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Fiskeが1427年2月26日にイギリスイギリススフォルクラクスフィールドで生まれた時，父Symon Fiskeは31歳，母Susanna Smythは26歳であった。約1454年にイギリスイギリススフォルクラクスフィールドでElizabeth Margery Simonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1495年10月4日にイギリスイギリススフォルクで68歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクラクスフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Fiske(이)가 1427년 2월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 라스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Symon Fiske(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Susanna Smyth(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1454년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 라스필드에서 Elizabeth Margery Simon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1495년 10월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 라스필드에 묻혔다.

mn.26 February 1427–4 October 1495: 1427 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 26–1495 оны Аравдугаар сарын 4
mn.Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingd: Laxfield, Sudfole, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.26 February 1427–4 October 1495: 26 de fevereiro de 1427–4 de outubro de 1495
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Fiske nasceu em 26 de fevereiro de 1427, em Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Symon Fiske, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Susanna Smyth, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Margery Simon aproximadamente 1454, em Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 4 de outubro de 1495, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Fiske родился 26 февраля 1427 г. в местности лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Symon Fiske было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Susanna Smyth, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Margery Simon около 1454 г. в местности лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 4 октября 1495 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия.

es.26 February 1427–4 October 1495: 26 de febrero de 1427–4 de octubre de 1495
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edmund Fiske nació el 26 de febrero de 1427, en Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Symon Fiske, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Susanna Smyth, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Margery Simon aproximadamente 1454, en Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 4 de octubre de 1495, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
